title: Create Additions Electrum Block
description: Adds the missing Block of Electrum to older versions of the Create: Crafts and Additions addon.
body:
". . .A brave mod, a mod not afriad to criticize, a mod not afraid to fix the mistakes of its forbearers, too long have we suffered under the inadequacy of Create Crafts & Additions, too long have our builds been missing the **Electrum Block**!" - dejojotheawsome


![Blocks of Electrum in a grid](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/571001fe99b431636c39f777a5e4e206262295db.png)

This mod adds the missing Block of Electrum and its corresponding recipes to the Create: Crafts and Additions addon so that electrum is no longer the weak link in your Create-addon-mania metal generators.

**NOTE**: As of version 1.21.1, electrum blocks were made part of the base mod.

**Free for use in modpacks, that's why I made it**
